description: Simple local GUI for PyMuPDF4LLM — drag & drop PDF-to-Markdown conversion with configurable options. No cloud, no CLI.

This repository provides a comprehensive solution for extracting and organizing content from PDFs using PyMuPDF4LLM. It focuses on separating textual content and tabular data into structured Markdown files, enabling easy downstream processing for applications like Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems.

Extract academic PDF papers into structured Markdown with automatic figure-number mapping based on the Karpathy LLM-Wiki pattern, supporting dual backends: MinerU VLM API (recommended) and pymupdf4llm (fallback)

A simple CLI tool to split PDF books into markdown chapters. Uses ML-based layout analysis for clean, LLM-ready output. Supports TOC/bookmark detection,  regex patterns, table extraction, and code block preservation
智能PDF转换器，可针对每种文档类型自动选择最佳引擎（Docling/MinerU/PyMuPDF4LLM）。无需任何配置即可获得最佳的Markdown和Word输出效果。
